display_text: Ascetic's Cap, Cost: 0: Neutral item. Provides a passive effect that grants 40% Status resistance and 40% Slow Resistance for 3 seconds whenever a debuff would be applied to the owner. This makes the user temporarily more resilient to stuns, slows, and other negative effects. Stats: Status Resistance: 40%, Slow Resistance: 40%, Duration: 3s.
